texto: If I could understand everything the way I do now, I could make it all--and then it just stopped. Leaving me with that feeling like when you figure out something brilliant and profound in a dream, but you wake up, and all you remember is that you knew this amazing thing, and now it's just out of reach.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeff Parker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “If I could understand everything the way I do now, I could make it all--and then it just stopped.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, buffy, magic pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de magic e season-9.
